content: Hi there, welcome to Bloom Aesthetics Clinic! 😊 I'm Aria, and I'm here to help you today. Whether you have questions about our treatments, pricing, or would like to book an appointment, I'd love to assist. What can I do for you?

That's wonderful, I'd be happy to help point you in the right direction! We have two easy ways to book — via WhatsApp or through our website. No deposit is required, so it's completely hassle-free to get started!

Is there a particular treatment you're interested in, or would you like to start with a free 20-minute consultation first?

I'd love to find out a bit more about you so we can tailor our service perfectly. I have just a few quick questions — it'll only take a moment!

Could you tell me what type of business or role you're enquiring for? (e.g., personal, clinic partner, influencer)
Roughly how many treatments or bookings would you be looking at per month?
Are you currently using any booking or CRM tools, or would this be your first time?
Thank you so much — that's everything I need! I've noted your details and a member of our team will be in touch to discuss next steps. Is there anything else I can help you with in the meantime?
You're very welcome! 😊 Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions before your appointment. We look forward to welcoming you to Bloom Aesthetics Clinic! Have a lovely day! 🌸
